ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "infectious_period" INTEGER /* Duration for which an infected individual can transmit the disease */,
  "incubation_period" INTEGER /* Time between exposure and onset of symptoms */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Percentage of infected individuals who die from the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease being modeled */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., SIR, SEIR) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being used */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  "initial_conditions" TEXT /* Initial values for S, I, R, etc. */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current state of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data used */,
  "geographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic data used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_geographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("geographic_id") REFERENCES geographics ("geographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series" (
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time-series data point */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "time" REAL /* Time of the data point */,
  "S" INTEGER /* Number of susceptible individuals */,
  "I" INTEGER /* Number of infected individuals */,
  "R" INTEGER /* Number of recovered individuals */,
  "new_I" INTEGER /* Number of new infections */,
  "new_R" INTEGER /* Number of new recoveries */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data for the time point */,
  "geographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic data for the time point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_geographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("geographic_id") REFERENCES geographics ("geographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Size of the population */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the population */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographics" (
  "geographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic data point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data point */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation or model */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the generator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
